titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Office of Equal Opportunity records10-5-1464
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-03-08 23:45:05 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Office of Equal Opportunity records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University Office of Equal Opportunity

did.abstract: Advisory Board minutes and reports and other records of the office.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Office of Equal Opportunity handled diversity, disability, sexual harassment and other inclusion issues. The director reported to the Vice President of Human Resources. The functions of this office were changed to the Office of Workforce Diversity and Inclusion (now the Department of Inclusion and Workforce Diversity) and Student Disability Services in 1999.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Advisory Board minutes and reports and other records of the office.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Affirmative Action Related Materials Boxes 1-4, 7
Series II. Campus Building Construction Boxes 4, 6-7
Series VI. Sexual Harassment Related Materials Boxes 4, 7-8

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Office of Equal Opportunity Records, #10-5-1464. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
